Title: B852 Repair UH7 Parking Lot, NAS Lemoore, CA
Awardee: COMMAND PERFORMANCE CONSTRUCTORS INC Long Beach CA 90802 USA
Description: For Building 852, Unaccompanied Housing #7, at NAS Lemoore, CA The project requires repaving the Parking Lot using the Full Depth Recycling method. This includes new non-reflective thermoplastic striping, new handicapped signage and poles, new concrete parking bumpers, and new xeriscape cobbles—all in accordance with the project drawings and specifications. The Contractor must conduct a pavement survey to ensure proper drainage. The Contractor is responsible for utilizing all recycled materials, including grinding, milled, and pulverized materials, to correct low spots and ensure proper drainage. Additionally, the Contractor must dispose of any remaining recycled materials, waste materials, and debris from the project site to a disposal facility located outside the Naval Air Station Lemoore Base.

Title: Repair Service Roads Around H-Barracks #2, NAS Lemoore, CA
Awardee: COMMAND PERFORMANCE CONSTRUCTORS INC Long Beach CA 90802 USA
Description: At NAS Lemoore, the project requires repaving Parking Lots and Service Roads at H - Barracks # 2 and construction of new parking lots, widen the existing roads by Full Depth Recycling method, provide thermoplastic striping, new concrete wheel stops, new concrete collars, and new concrete sidewalks in accordance of project drawings and specifications. The Contractor must conduct a pavement survey to ensure proper drainage. The Contractor is responsible for utilizing all recycled materials, including grinding, milled, and pulverized materials, to correct low spots and ensure proper drainage. Additionally, the Contractor must dispose of any remaining recycled materials, waste materials, and debris from the project site to a disposal facility located outside the Naval Air Station Lemoore Base.

Title: Test Evaluation and Support Team 3 (TEST3) Period of Performance Extension
Awardee: SIERRA LOBO INC Fremont OH 43420 USA
Description: NASA Johnson Space Center White Sands Test Facility (JSC WSTF) extended the Test Evaluation and Support Team 3 (TEST3) contract with Sierra Lobo, Inc. for up to two years (1-year base with 1-year option) to allow sufficient time for successful completion of two large-scale construction projects at WSTF funded by One Big Beautiful Bill Act (OBBBA). This extension supports the effective utilization of the OBBBA funds by ensuring that the projects are conducted timely and are overseen and implemented by the experienced TEST3 contractor workforce who are already familiar with the site’s operational needs and project plans. The statutory authority permitting other than full and open competition is 10 U.S.C. 3204(a)(1), as implemented by FAR 6.103-1, Only one responsible source and no other supplies or services will satisfy agency requirements. See Justification for Other Than Full and Open Competition (JOFOC) for further details.

Title: C-40 Contractor Logistics Support: Award
Awardee: AAR GOVERNMENT SERVICES, INC. Wood Dale IL 60191 USA
Description: This contract action is for a five-year IDIQ for Contract Logistics Support (CLS) services for the C-40A fleet of aircraft during the period of 1 April 2026 through 31 March 2031. Performance-based CLS is necessary to ensure the operational capabilities for the use and sustainment of the United States Navy (USN) and United States Marine Corps (USMC) C-40A aircraft. CLS activities include Main Operating Base (MOB) Logistics and Material Support; Field Team and Detachment Support; Scheduled and Unscheduled Depot Level Aircraft and Component Maintenance, Modification, and Repair; Commercial Line Maintenance (CLM); and Scheduled and Unscheduled O-Level and Depot Level Support Equipment (SE) Maintenance, Modification, and Repair. The contract also provides for aircraft, engine, and support equipment maintenance and modifications and contains provision for Over-and-Above (O&A) work to be performed as necessary.

Title: FLITE II Follow-On Contract Award Notification
Awardee: BLUE YONDER DEFENSE SOLUTIONS, LLC Dallas TX 75244 USA
Description: A contract is awarded without Competitition. This commercial service acquisition is for a follow-on contract for an annual enterprise license and specialized technical support services to BYDS, LLC (formerly One Network Enterprises, Inc). The customized enterprise license covers access to BYDS's commercial off the shelf (COTS) software product, their Department of Defense Core (DoDC) platform, and FLITES Software Development Kit (SDK). This includes software maintenance updates for policy, compliance, security, and enabling functionality of FLITES requirements. The Technical Services are for unique and highly specialized services specifically related to intricacies and system configuration requirements of the BYDS product, DoDC and FLITES SDK. This critical service is required to support the FLITES Integrated Program office (IPO) with the configuration, development, integration, testing, and deployment of the FLITES application, and to operate and sustain FLITES in a Government approved cloud environment. The FLITES solution is developed by and with BYDS's product software as the underlying platform. The Government is the System Integrator (SI) and is responsible for the configuration and development of the FLITES application using FLITES SDK with support from BYDS. The technical service will perform all different types of services to include maintenance, repair/bug fixes, enhancements, development work, integration, testing, and problem solving to include within the FLITES SDK. The Techniclal support services develops solutions, repairs, updates, bug fixes and development in BYDS product and DoDC as necessary to enable seamless communication and integration to support the FLITES SDK. This is a three (3)- layer system to include BYDS product, DoDC, and FLITES SDK application. Only BYDS has expertise in all three layers of FLITES to know which layer the maintenance, repair, or development is necessary to meet Government requirements. In order for FLITES to be fully functional, it requires integration and interfaces between the FLITES SDK with the BYDS product and DoDC. While customization can be done at the application layer using the FLITES SDK, certain functions, corrections, or fixes that must be performed on the BYDS product or DoDC that enable the FLITES application functionality.
